---
title: "plotly"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(p8105.datasets)
library(plotly)
```

Let's load the AirBnB dataset

```{r}
data("nyc_airbnb")

nyc_airbnb = 
  nyc_airbnb |> 
  mutate(
    rating = review_scores_location / 2
  ) |> 
  #narrowing dataset eventually helps with making loading online easier
  select(
    neighbourhood_group, neighbourhood, rating, price, room_type, lat, long
  ) |> 
  filter(
    neighbourhood_group == "Manhattan",
    room_type == "Entire home/apt",
    price <= 500,
    price >= 100
  )
```

Let's make a scatterplot but interactive this time

```{r}
nyc_airbnb |> 
  mutate(
    label = str_c("Price : $", price, "\nRating: ", rating) #\n means new line
  ) |> 
  plot_ly(
    x = ~lat, y = ~long, color = ~price,
    text = ~ label,
    type = "scatter", mode = "markers"
  )
```
